summary: Recent updates to WebGPU, a new standard for high-performance graphics and compute on the web, include enhancements to the conformance test suite and improved canvas functionality. The WebGPU conformance test suite (CTS) has been updated to the latest version, ensuring that the implementation adheres to the most recent specifications and behaves consistently across platforms. Additionally, the ability to **support readback from a WebGPU canvas before it is used** allows developers to access rendered data more flexibly, improving the efficiency of rendering workflows. These changes are important as they enhance the quality and capabilities of graphics applications on the web, enabling richer and more interactive user experiences.
